passwordReset.subject: Reset your Astral Pirates password
text: We reclaimed your open invite slot to issue a secure password reset link. Only follow this link if you requested it:
The link expires on {{expiresAt}}. Once you finish resetting your password, every other device signed into your account will be logged out and must reauthenticate.
If you did not request this reset, ignore the message and your slot will return after the link expires.
html: We reclaimed your open invite slot to issue a secure password reset link. Only follow this link if you requested it:
The link expires on {{expiresAt}}. Once you finish resetting your password, every other device signed into your account will be logged out and must reauthenticate.
If you did not request this reset, ignore the message and your slot will return after the link expires.

recruitInvite.subject: {{inviterLabel}} invited you to join the Astral Pirates crew
text: {{inviterLabel}} invited you to join the Astral Pirates crew. Finish setting up your account here:

This link expires on {{expiresAt}}. For security we never display enlistment links inside the site—this email is the only copy. If you later request a password reset, we will reclaim this slot automatically until the reset completes or expires.
If you are not expecting this message, ignore it and the slot will return to {{inviterLabel}} after the link expires.
html: {{inviterLabel}} invited you to join the Astral Pirates crew.
Finish your enlistment to come aboard.

This link expires on {{expiresAt}}. For security we never display enlistment links inside the site—this email is the only copy. If you later request a password reset, we will reclaim this slot automatically until the reset completes or expires.
If you are not expecting this message, ignore it and the slot will return to {{inviterLabel}} after the link expires.

requestInvite.subject: Complete your Astral Pirates registration
text: Open the secure link below to finish your Astral Pirates registration:
This link expires on {{expiresAt}}. If you did not request this message, you can ignore it.
html: Open the secure link below to finish your Astral Pirates registration:
This link expires on {{expiresAt}}. If you did not request this message, you can ignore it.
